form.formComment: Resuming after a break of ten weeks. Finished off last preparation fifth of 8 at Mt Gambier 3yo+ Mdn-Sw January 25 over 906m, 5 len behind Gatsby Crown carrying 58kg at $81. Previously first up; ran last of 11 at Mt Gambier 3yo+ Mdn-Sw November 28 over 1300m, 29 len behind Banyan Jenni carrying 58kg at $21. Will find this tougher than what he was up against prior to a spell and hard to see him improving enough to feature in this.
